deployBounty(string,(string,string,uint2.details: TODO: Implement. Import BountyContract and deploy.         Record in deployedBounties and isBountyContract.         Emit BountyDeployed.

deployCommunity(string,(address[],uint8).details: TODO: Implement. Import CommunityRegistry contract and deploy with CREATE2.         Use keccak256(abi.encodePacked(founder, name, block.timestamp)) as salt.         After deploy: call nftRegistry.registerCommunity(newCommunity).         Record in deployedCommunities and isCommunity mapping.         Emit CommunityDeployed.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

deployBounty(string,(string,string,uint2.notice: Deploy a new BountyContract for an individual bounty.

deployCommunity(string,(address[],uint8).notice: Deploy a new CommunityRegistry for a community.

mediationKey().notice: The platform mediation address — a company-controlled hardware multisig (Gnosis Safe).

mintPlatformNFT(address,string).notice: Mint a platform NFT to a new user. Only callable by owner (backend relay).
